title: Recovering a Forgotten Password
drDigitalIntro:
Forgot your password? Don't panic.
• Every site has a "Forgot Password" link on the login page.
• Click it, enter your email, and check your inbox for a reset link.
• Follow the link, create a new strong password, and you're back in.

playgroundTask.goal: You recovered your account using a password reset email

steps.say: You forgot your password — click 'Forgot password?' below the login button.
A reset link was sent to your email. Click 'Open Mail' to check your inbox.
Open the reset email and click 'Reset My Password'.

drDigitalSuccess: Password reset complete! You went from Forgot Password to your inbox to a brand-new password. A password manager can save you from doing this again.
drDigitalHint: Follow each step: type your email, click Forgot Password, check your email, and set a new password.
